title: Vietnamese Pho with Chewy Noodles and Tangy Broth
description: A traditional Vietnamese noodle soup made with a flavorful and tangy broth, served with chewy rice noodles and topped with cheese.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large pot, combine the pho broth mix, vegetable broth, soy sauce, and fish sauce.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Add the lime juice and stir to combine.
Cook for 10-15 minutes, or until the broth is flavorful and hot.
Serve the broth over the cooked noodles, topped with shredded cheese.
Garnish with additional lime wedges and chopped herbs, if desired.
